items.claim: Max Holloway has not physically bulked up properly for the 170-pound weight class.
items.quote: I don't think he put on the weight the right way.

items.claim: Conor McGregor has physically bulked up to look like a legitimate welterweight.
items.quote: Conor looks like a legit welterweight.

items.claim: Conor McGregor has not fought in five years.
Conor McGregor has only won one fight in the last ten years.
items.quote: Conor's won one fight in 10 years.

items.claim: Conor McGregor out-wrestled and dominated Max Holloway on the ground in their first fight.
items.quote: Conor goes out there and out-wrestles a very young Max Holloway. First round is on the feet, Conor wins it, but second and third rounds, Conor decides to wrestle Max and he's dominant on the ground with Max Holloway.

items.claim: Max Holloway is the best boxer in the UFC.
items.quote: You're fighting the guy who's the self-proclaimed best boxer in the UFC.

items.claim: Conor McGregor would lose to Islam Makhachev.
